query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.name,
  e.address,
  e.neighborhood,
  e.hours,
  c.name as category_name,
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM menu_items m WHERE m.establishment_id = e.id) THEN 'Sim' ELSE 'Não' END as tem_cardapio
FROM establishments e
LEFT JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
ORDER BY c.name, e.name
LIMIT 5;

  CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM menu_items m WHERE m.establishment_id = e.id) THEN 'Sim' ELSE 'Não' END as tem_cardapio
FROM establishments e
